---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r}
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

#setwd("C:/Users/your/file")

df <- read_excel("computer_broadband.xlsx", col_names = TRUE)

df_long <- df %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -`Label (Grouping)`,
    names_to = "Tract",
    values_to = "Count"
  )

df_clean <- df_long %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = `Label (Grouping)`,
    values_from = Count
  )

df_clean <- df_clean %>%
  mutate(
    Tract = as.factor(round(as.numeric(Tract), 2)),
    Total_households = as.numeric(Total_households),
    With_a_computer = as.numeric(With_a_computer)
  )

df_clean <- df_clean %>%
  mutate(
    prop_computer = With_a_computer / Total_households,
    prop_broadband = 
      With_a_broadband_Internet_subscription / Total_households
  )

df_clean


```
